Premed.Note: Dexametazón 8 mg p.o. 12h PRED, 1h pred, 12h PO infúzii (3 dávky). Pantoprazol 40 mg p.o. Bisulepin 1 mg i.v.

Instructions.Name: docetaxel
Instructions.Inst: prvych 30mg v 500ml FR iv /45 min, zvysok v 500ml FR / 60 min

_source: Tannock IF et al. NEJM 2004;351:1502 (TAX327); BCCA GUAVDOC; eviQ Prostate Docetaxel
